basic_details.post_name: Project Technical Support I Field Assistant
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) has officially announced the Project Technical Support I Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published at aiimsjodhpur.edu.in. Candidates with a maximum age of 28 years and a qualification of 10th pass with a Diploma in MLT/ DMLT along with two years of relevant experience are eligible to attend the walkin interview on 17 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and check the walk-in details are provided below.

qualification.education_qualification: 10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/) + two Years experience in relevant subject/ field
qualification.details: 10th Pass Diploma in MLT/DMLT Two Years of experience in the relevant subject/field.

Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support-I Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support-I Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Jodhpur?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Technical Support-I Field Assistant post at AIIMS Jodhpur is scheduled for 17th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Support-I Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: The required qualification is 10th pass along with a Diploma in MLT/DMLT and at least two years of relevant experience in the specified field.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 28 years.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-I Field Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 18,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Technical Support-I Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Technical Support-I Field Assistant position at AIIMS Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies of your ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificate (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at AIIMS Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the AIIMS Jodhpur located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Jodhpur is located in Jodhpur, Rajasthan.
